data_version.rule: Versioned D1 dataset identifier; corporate-action semantic changes require a new data_version before formal use.

universe_id.rule: Research universe identifier; D1-T03 does not materialize universe membership.

time_segment_id.rule: Configured time segment key; action facts must not imply events outside the approved segment boundary.

security_id.rule: Project-internal stable security key from the D1-T01 contract.

action_id.rule: Source-snapshot-scoped action identifier; corrections must not overwrite prior action evidence.

action_type.rule: Controlled corporate-action type for the event.

ex_date.rule: Exchange ex-date on which the mechanical price adjustment takes effect.

record_date.rule: Shareholder record date; may be null only when the approved source explicitly lacks the date.

pay_date.rule: Cash or distribution payment date; may be null only when the approved source explicitly lacks the date.

action_terms.rule: Structured-as-text action terms sufficient to reconstruct attribution review; raw vendor payloads must not be stored here.

source_registry_id.rule: Registry id of the approved source snapshot; formal ingestion remains unauthorized in D1-T03.

source_snapshot_id.rule: Immutable raw snapshot reference required before any future loader can write formal rows.

observed_at.rule: Timestamp at which the corporate-action fact was observed or retrieved; later corrections require new provenance.

run_id.rule: Run manifest id required before formal materialization; D1-T03 does not create run manifests.

action_type.unknown_value_rule: unknown must remain explicit and blocks formal downstream release until quality review resolves it.

source_registry_requirements.reason: HiThink remains only a candidate source for corporate_actions; source terms, as-of behavior, revision behavior, raw snapshot retention, manifests, and run authorization are not closed.

tables.as_of_policy: Corporate action facts must record observed_at separately from ex_date, record_date, and pay_date; formal use is blocked until point-in-time semantics are reviewed.
tables.revision_policy: Any correction to action_terms, ex_date, record_date, pay_date, action_type, or action attribution requires a new source_snapshot_id or data_version and must not overwrite old evidence.
tables.downstream_boundary: Corporate actions are mechanical gap attribution facts; R0 must not read D1 directly and may use them only through D3 references.

data_version.rule: Versioned D2 dataset identifier; factor or continuous-price semantic changes require a new data_version before formal use.

universe_id.rule: Research universe identifier; D1-T03 does not materialize adjusted price rows.

time_segment_id.rule: Configured time segment key; adjustment facts must not imply observations outside the approved segment boundary.

security_id.rule: Project-internal stable security key from the D1-T01 contract.

trading_date.rule: Exchange-local observation date for the adjusted research price.

adj_open.rule: Continuous research open price generated by a future approved adjustment process; D1-T03 does not compute this value.

adj_high.rule: Continuous research high price generated by a future approved adjustment process; D1-T03 does not compute this value.

adj_low.rule: Continuous research low price generated by a future approved adjustment process; D1-T03 does not compute this value.

adj_close.rule: Continuous research close price generated by a future approved adjustment process; D1-T03 does not compute this value.

adjustment_factor.rule: Positive adjustment factor with source and revision provenance; must be traceable by data_version, source_snapshot_id, and adjustment_revision.

adjustment_method.rule: Controlled adjustment methodology used by future materialization.

factor_as_of_time.rule: Timestamp at which the factor was known or retrieved; must not use future corporate-action knowledge relative to the observation date.

corporate_action_flag.rule: Explicit flag that the adjusted row is affected by corporate-action attribution; unknown quality must not be converted to false.

adjustment_revision.rule: Controlled revision id for the adjustment calculation; factor or method changes require a new revision or data_version.

source_registry_id.rule: Registry id of the approved source snapshot; formal ingestion remains unauthorized in D1-T03.

source_snapshot_id.rule: Immutable raw snapshot reference required before any future loader can write formal rows.

run_id.rule: Run manifest id required before formal materialization; D1-T03 does not create run manifests.

adjustment_method.unknown_value_rule: unknown must remain explicit and blocks formal downstream release until quality review resolves it.

adjustment_revision.unknown_value_rule: unknown must not be used in frozen or released data products.

source_registry_requirements.reason: HiThink remains a candidate source and BaoStock remains only a candidate or backup for adjusted_market_prices; factor as-of, source terms, revision behavior, raw snapshot retention, manifests, and run authorization are not closed.

tables.as_of_policy: factor_as_of_time must bound all adjustment factors and must not use future corporate-action knowledge relative to the observation date.
tables.revision_policy: Any correction to adjustment_factor, adjustment_method, factor_as_of_time, corporate_action_flag, or attribution requires a new adjustment_revision, source_snapshot_id, or data_version.
tables.downstream_boundary: Adjusted market prices are continuous research prices for later D2/D3 use; D1-T03 does not compute them and R0 may use them only through D3 references.

shared_boundary.d3_entry_rule: R0 must not read d1.corporate_actions or d2.adjusted_market_prices directly; D3 remains the only formal daily research entry point.
shared_boundary.mechanical_gap_rule: Ex-right, ex-dividend, bonus share, rights issue, split, reverse split, and other corporate-action mechanical gaps must not be interpreted directly as market release signals.
shared_boundary.factor_as_of_rule: factor_as_of_time must prevent future corporate-action knowledge from contaminating historical observations, and factors must be traceable by data_version, source_snapshot_id, and adjustment_revision.
shared_boundary.revision_rule: Any action_terms, ex_date, factor_as_of_time, adjustment_factor, or adjustment_method correction must create a new source_snapshot_id, adjustment_revision, or data_version rather than overwriting old evidence.

future_loader_requirements: Future loader must read only approved raw snapshots and manifests, never live APIs.

Future loader must fail non-zero on duplicate primary keys, invalid controlled vocabulary values, invalid nullable fields, invalid date ordering, nonpositive adjustment factors, missing factor_as_of_time, or missing source snapshot references.
Future loader must not populate d1.corporate_actions or d2.adjusted_market_prices until source terms, raw snapshot, manifest, as-of, revision, and run authorization gates pass.
Future loader must preserve source provenance outside DuckDB raw byte storage and must not store vendor payloads in formal tables.
